missing_key_points: The ranking is internally awkward because it separates thermodynamics+compressibility and standalone compressibility, even though compressibility was one of the requested categories.
It does not explicitly map every evidence type to a concise failure mode/artifact in a uniform way.
Transport discussion cites a fractional QSH edge-conductance claim not included in the supplied visible context.
summary: Good, mostly grounded synthesis that answers the hierarchy question and includes caveats. It correctly distinguishes bulk incompressibility, topological transport, spatial inhomogeneity, and optical proxy evidence. Main weaknesses are citation specificity, one citation apparently outside the supplied context, and a somewhat confused hierarchy that double-counts compressibility under thermodynamics.
